description: Shell Detector — skill + CI gate script that classifies pages as LIVE/DEMO/SHELL and blocks merges if new shells introduced

shell-detector-script.evidence: scripts/shell-detector.mjs created + runs successfully. Baseline: 65 shells (24.3%). CI gate in .github/workflows/ci.yml. npm run shell:check + shell:baseline wired.

ci-integration.evidence: Shell Detector Gate step added to CI lint job. Regression detection blocks merges if new shells introduced.
